title: Champhaiah Excise & Narcotics department-in heroin gram 99 man
content:
925/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 10th June 2026:Tukin dar 10:30 khan Excise & Narcotics Enforcement staff te chuan Zotlang Champhai, Seventh Day Adventist motor workshop pengah Heroin 99 grams (hawng 8) an man a, phurh nana hman motor car bearing regn. No. MZ 01/L-0335 an man a, hemi kaihhnawihah hian Ikbal Hussain (28), S/o Fakar Uddin, Karimganj, Assam nia inchhal chu an man nghal a ni. The Narcotics Drugs & Psychotropic Substances Act, 1985 thlawh chhanin thubuai siam nghal a ni.

title: Mamit-ah Voter Awareness Forum neih a ni
content:
924/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 10th of June, 2026 :Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah Mamit khawpui chhunga office hrang hrang atanga Nodal Officers a ruatte tan Special Intensive Revision chungchang zirhona neih a ni a, training hi Pu Suvigya S. Chandra, District Election Officer/District Bawrhsap chuan a hawng.

Pu Suvigya S Chandra chuan India khua leh tui vote nei thei chinte tana roll thar siam tura  hmalak mekah mipuite chu BLO te tawiawma,lo dawngsawng tha turin a chah a, vote thlak thei tura inziahluh chu khua leh tui kan nihna nemngehna leh document pawimawh tak a nih avangin ngaipawimawh turin a chah bawk.

Pu Lalnunfela Chawngthu, Election Officer chuan Special Intensive Revision kalpui meka form fill-up dan zirtirna a nei a, Voter Awareness Forum chu tuna kan kalpui mek SIR atan chuah pawh nilo, Office tina thawktute'n Election kaihhnawih hrim hrim kan hriat theih nana ruahman a nih thu a sawi a, kan thawhna theuhah kan thawhpuite hrilhhretu ni tura inbuatsaih turin a chah bawk.

Pu Ramropuia, UDC, DC Office chuan Online hmanga SIR form fill-up dan kalkhawmte zirtirna a lem nen a nei bawk a ni.

He hunah hian Mamit khawpui chhung Department hrang hranga officers te leh thawktute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP LEH CYLA OFFICE BEARERS- TE INKAWM
content:
923/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 10th June, 2026 :Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00AM khan Deputy Commissioner, Lawngtlai Office Chamber- ah Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga'n Central YLA Office Bearers- te kawm.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Central YLA Office Bearers- te hnena lawmthu a sawina a nei a. Ruihhlo do kalpui mekah committee- peng hrang hrangte awm mahse, CYLA- te nen kan hmalaknate kan in hriat pawh a tul hle a ni, a ti. Bawrhsap chuan ruihhlo mai bakah foreigners leh sumdawnna chungchangah pawh hmalakna tur tam tak a awm a, State Sawrkarah Preliminary SOP- te thehluh niin tun thla chhung hian approval hmuh beisei a nih thu a tarlang. CYLA, LWA, MHIP- te chu District Administration - hmalaknaah an pawimawh em em a, sawrkar kut ke tak tak an ni tih sawiin, thawhho zel a tul hle a ti a. Bawrhsap chuan Lawngtlai District chu ruihhlo laka a lo him a, lawng hrang hranga hma a sawn zel theih nana thawhpuiah a sawm nghal bawk.

Thutkhawmah hian hmalakhona hrang hrangte ennawn a ni a. A bik takin Operation Jericho kalpui mekah DRS, CYLA nena thawhhona chu a fakawm hle tih pawm tlangin,tun dinhmunah Lawngtlaiah Chakma zu khawthlang lam atanga a lo lut tam ber in, Ruihhlo bik chu Lunglei leh Siaha lam atang lo lut a tam ber tih report ngaihthlak a ni a. Heng zu leh Ruihhlo do rem tur hian a lo luhna hriat a nih angin chak zawka hmalak ho ni se an ti a ni. CYLA - lam pawhin Ruihhlo do na atan a mamawh an neihte thlen in, Bawrhsap chuan a theih ang anga ngaihtuah a nih tur thu a tarlang a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian Central YLA Office Bearers - te an tel kim tha hle a, Bawrhsap chuan lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm a khar.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER DISCUSSES SIR 2026 TOLL-FREE HELPLINE ISSUE WITH BSNL TELECOM SERVICE PROVIDERS
content:
155/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 10 June 2026:A meeting was held today at 10:00 AM between the District Election Officer (DEO), Lawngtlai, Shri Donny Lalruatsanga, and representatives of BSNL, the telecom service provider, regarding issues related to the toll-free helpline being used for the ongoing Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026.

During the meeting, the DEO stated that the toll-free helpline number 1950 is being used across the country for election-related services. However, difficulties have arisen in Lawngtlai District because both Lawngtlai and Siaha districts share the same STD code. As a result, calls made to the toll-free helpline are often not routed correctly, with some calls from Lawngtlai being directed to Siaha. He pointed out that this has caused inconvenience to both the public and the Election Office and requested BSNL officials to assist in resolving the issue.

The BSNL representatives acknowledged the problem and suggested that efforts be made to obtain a separate STD code for Lawngtlai District. They also recommended that the matter be formally communicated to the General Manager, BSNL, Aizawl, for necessary action.

The meeting concluded with a discussion on possible measures to ensure the smooth functioning of the election helpline service in the district.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER - IN SIR 2026  KALPUI MEK AH BSNL TELECOM SERVICE PROVIDER TE TOLL-FREE HELPLINE CHUNGCHANG SAWIPUI
content:
922/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 10th June, 2026 :Vawiin chawhma dar 10:00AM khan Lawngtlai District Election Officer Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan SIR 2026 kalpui meka Toll-Free Helpline chunchangah BSNL, Telecom Service Provider, Lawngtlai kawmna nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Lawngtlai District a SIR kalpui mek ah toll-free helpline number 1950 in ang vek hman a ni a, Lawngtlai District leh Siaha District in STD number in ang an hman avanga harsatna a awm thu a sawi a. Toll free helpline chu call tlang that theih loh a nih bakah call siam a nihin Siaha lama call kal thin thu a tarlang a. DEO chuan hei hian mipuiah leh Election Office lamah harsatna a siam tih sawiin sutkian pui turin BSNL telecom Serivece provider - te a sawm a ni.

BSNL Telecom Serivece Provider - te chuan an harsatna an hriatthiampui tih tarlangin, Lawngtlai District- in STD number dang a neih theihna tura chak zawka hmalak ni se an ti a. General Manager, BSNL, Telecom Provider, Aizawlah ziaka thlen ni se an ti a ni.

title: HOME MINISTER IN NCC INTER– GROUP PRE – SUBROTO U-17 HMEICHHE FOOTBALL TOURNAMENT A HAWNG
content:
921/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 10th June, 2026 :Vawiin khan Home Minister Pu K.Sapdanga chuan National Cadet Corps Inter- Group, Pre-Subroto U-17 Girls Football Tournament, Rajiv Gandhi Stadium Mualpui a neih chu khuallian niin a hmanpui. Tun tum tournament hi Directorate of North Eastern Region NCC hnuaia NCC Group Headquarters, Aizawl Mizoram in a thleng(Host) a ni.

Minister chuan tournament hawnna inkhawmah North East State hrang hrang atanga inkhel tura lo kalte chu Mizoram aiawha lawmna thu a sawi a; hmarchhak state-te chu India ram pumpui ang pawha footballer tha tak tak chher chhuak thintu an ni tiin, India ram mai pawh ni lo, ram pawn thleng pawha inkhel thiam tirchhuak zel thei tu ni tura theihtawp chhuah turin tournament-a inkhel tura kalte chu a chah a ni. NCC-in hetiang ang tournament tha tak mai an buatsaih chu lawmawm a tih thu sawi bawkin Minister chuan hmeichhe inkhel thin te tana kawng hawnsaktu pawimawh tak a nih thu a sawi a. Football khel tura quality pawimawhte chu NCC kalphung nen pawha inmil tak a nih thu sawiin, inelna a nih rualin inunauna tha zawk siam nana hun hmang tel turin inkhel turte a chah nghal bawk a ni. Minister hian torunament trophy leh medal tlangzarhna hun a hmang nghal bawk.

Pre – Subroto Cup-ah hian North East State hrang hrang atangin team pariat - Silchar Group, Aizawl Group, Kohima Group, Jorhat Group, Guwahati Group, Shillong Group, Tezpur Group leh Dibrugarh Group te an inel dawn a, June 17 ah final khelh tur niin, heta chakte chu North East Region Player atan thlan an ni anga, Delhi-a International Football Cup August 2026-a neih tur ah an khel leh dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: Serkawn Christian Hospital,  Lawngtlai Christian Hospital leh Mizoram sawrkarin MUHCS 2.0-ah inremna ziak
content:
920/2026-2027

Aizawl the 10th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuii pisa, MINECO Aizawlah Mizoram Universal Health Care Scheme kum hnihna - MUHCS 2.0 atana sawrkar nena thawhhona thuthlung chu Health Minister kaihhruaina hnuaiah Christian Hospital Serkawn leh Christian Hospital Lawngtlai ten an ziak.

Mizoram State Health Care Society aiawhin CEO Dr. Lalhriatzuali Ralte, IAS bakah Dr. Vanlalremsiama, Deputy CEO leh Dr. K. Lalnghinglova, CFO ten an sign a; Christian Hospital Serkawn leh Lawngtlai aiawhin Pu H. Lalthlamuana leh Rev. Dr. R. Zolawma ten hming an ziak thung a ni.

Tun dinhmunah Mizoram chhunga private leh kohhran enkawl damdawi in 18 ten MUHCS an zawm tawh a ni.

Attachment
